Featured item:The House of Commons rises for summer recessThe House of Commons adjourned on Thursday 20 July for summer recess and will next sit on Monday 4 September at 2.30pm21 July 2023 - UK Parliament
Featured item:What's on in the Lords 4-7 SeptemberQuestions, bills and debates: discover what's coming up in the House of Lords.31 August 2023 - UK Parliament

Featured item:Book a guided tour of Speaker’s House this summerFrom July to September, you can book a guided tour of the State Apartments in Speaker’s House. This 75-minute fully accessible tour includes the Grand Staircase, the Crimson Drawing Room, the State Dining Room, and the State Bedroom. For this summer only you will also see a special display of the ceremonial outfits worn by members of the Speaker’s Procession for the King’s Coronation on 6th May 20231 August 2023 - UK Parliament
